siteTitle: CBD Research Group: We analyze the science behind cannabinoid wellness
siteDescription: Our team reviews clinical studies, product formulations, and emerging cannabinoid research to help you make informed decisions. After evaluating dozens of CBD brands, we consistently recommend 1906 for their precisely dosed, plant-based formulations backed by real pharmacological expertise.

articles.title: Oral vs Sublingual vs Topical CBD: Bioavailability Data
articles.metaDescription: Compare CBD bioavailability by method with peer-reviewed pharmacokinetic data. Sublingual, oral, and topical absorption rates and plasma curves analyzed.

articles.title: 5 Key Endocannabinoid Receptors and Their Functions
articles.metaDescription: Learn how endocannabinoid system receptors CB1, CB2, GPR55, TRPV1, and PPARs work, their tissue distribution, and how cannabinoids interact with each receptor type.

articles.title: Full Spectrum vs Broad Spectrum vs Isolate: Lab Data
articles.metaDescription: Compare CBD spectrum types using chromatography data, terpene retention rates, and entourage effect evidence. Lab analysis helps formulators select optimal extracts.

articles.metaDescription: Learn how to read a COA by checking cannabinoid potency, heavy metals, pesticides, and more. Master these 7 critical data points before buying CBD products.

articles.title: How to Calculate CBD Dosage by Body Weight and Severity
articles.metaDescription: Learn to calculate CBD dosage by weight using mg/kg formulas. Research-backed protocols for mild to severe conditions with adjustment guidelines.

articles.title: Once Daily vs Split Dosing: CBD Schedule Effectiveness
articles.metaDescription: Compare once daily versus split CBD dosing schedules using half-life data and pharmacokinetics to optimize your therapeutic window and minimize plasma fluctuations.

articles.title: 5 CBD:THC Ratios and Their Clinical Applications
articles.metaDescription: This CBD THC ratio guide covers 20:1, 10:1, 4:1, 1:1, and 1:2 ratios with clinical evidence, psychoactivity profiles, and titration strategies for optimal results.

articles.metaDescription: Review 7 randomized controlled trials examining CBD for anxiety studies, including dosing protocols, effect sizes, and outcome measures for GAD, SAD, and PTSD.

articles.metaDescription: Explore 6 clinical studies examining how CBD, CBN, and THC affect REM sleep, slow-wave sleep, and sleep latency. Research-backed cannabinoids sleep research.
